attributes.action: Introduce law on weather modification transparency and liability
attributes.additional_details: Large-scale environmental interventions may affect public health and ecosystems. Without transparency and accountability, public trust is undermined. Current laws may not adequately address concealment or harm. A clear legal framework is needed to ensure disclosure, independent scrutiny, and consequences where information is withheld or risks are misrepresented.
attributes.background: Pass legislation requiring disclosure of any weather modification or geoengineering activities. Create independent oversight, impose a legal duty of care, and introduce criminal liability for concealment or misrepresentation, with civil damages available to affected individuals.

departments.name: Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758008
